text:
is a song from Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It is track 4 in the album Music from "Shin Evangelion": Evangelion: 3.0+1.0, disc 2. https://vgmdb.net/album/107287 

Lyrics

 
What I know is not what I see
I play tricks on me

Mirror, mirror on the wall
Tell no truths at all

What I know is not what I see
I play tricks on me

What I know is not what I see
I play tricks on me

Mirror, mirror on the wall
Tell no truths at all
